description:
Overview:

[New and upgraded style] This rotating and suspended night light adopts a new design and production process. Using stepless dimming, the light is very soft. You can change the lighting to your. The lights can be switched on and off by induction, which is very convenient. It also has a wireless charging function for mobile phones, which is very convenient.
[Easy to operate] This gravity suspension light can be and off at any time with just one click, which is very convenient and fast.
[Function] This is not a night light placed on the bedside, but can also be used as a decoration with a modern sense of technology. I think you will be surprised when see it. If you have scientific principles, you are more likely to be liked
[Charging Cable Charging Energy Saving] Easily charge via the charging cable (included). It doesn't give you light when you're resting or reading, but you can also place your phone on it to charge. When you have enough power, your phone will also be fully charged, reducing your waiting time.
[Perfect Gift]: This multifunctional cabinet light is perfect for bedrooms, living rooms and more. This small table lamp full of technology is a gift for children and family members. The lighting and charging features will make you love this little table


Product information:
Rated Power: 3W
Specifications: Gray basic style, White basic style, gray wireless charger, White wireless charger
Size: base 126 * 35mm ± 2mm upper cover 90 * 150mm ± 2mm height 217mm

Switching mode: waving control
Wireless charging output: 15W wireless charging PD+QC protocol (compatible with 10W, 7.5W, and 5W)


Packing list:
1* Table Lamp
